Type below to see real-time text metrics calculated with $derived.by

Words

{metrics.wordCount}

Characters

{metrics.charCount}

Status

{metrics.isLong ? 'Long text' : 'Short text'}

Word Count {metrics.wordCount} / 15
{#if metrics.wordCount > 0}

Letter Frequency

{#each Object.entries(Object.fromEntries(Object.entries( [...text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '')].reduce((acc, char) => { acc[char] = (acc[char] || 0) + 1; return acc; }, {}) ).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]).slice(0, 12))) as [letter, count]}
{letter} {count}
{/each}
{/if}

Interactive Svelte 5 rune demonstration

Current Value

"{text}"

Character Count

{text.length}

How it works

This component uses $inspect to log reactive state changes, .with() for custom callbacks, and $inspect.trace() inside an effect to trace execution. Open the browser console to see the logs.

  • $inspect.trace() inside the effect logs execution traces
